calledOn.description: The entity that the weapon is attached on.

parameters.name: weapon
parameters.description: The weapon that is being attached to the entity.

api.example:
characterModel AttachWeapon( weapon_right["weapon"], weaponRenderOptions, weapon_right["acvi"] );
characterModel UseWeaponHideTags( weapon_right["weapon"] );
remarks: When errors are suppressed (ie. not in developer mode), passing an invalid weapon into this function will hard-crash the game. This is prone to happening with invalid wallbuys in Zombies.
